summary: Sweeps every discovered workflow's real image_layer() for \bgh\b and fails today with 3 real offenders (github-peer-reviewed, github-self-reviewed, review) — rejects the actual apt-install violation; text inspection is direct verification for a layer-content MUST NOT, not keyword theater. Caveat: an exotic .deb-download install (gh_*.deb, no standalone 'gh' token) could evade the regex.
